# Ratchet Rebaseline Approval 2026-05-08

Approved-by: Repository owner via chat request
Reason: Authorize a dedicated follow-up protected-path ratchet or rebaseline slice for the current dirty worktree so `pyproject.toml` and checked-in ratchet artifacts can be updated, if needed, to mirror same-change evidence while reconciling debt-touch blockers. This approval also covers same-worktree approval-record discovery fixes when the existing record is not visible to policy diff detection. This approval does not waive the requirement to keep structural and typing ratchets monotonic or to avoid using rebaselines instead of real fixes.
